name: Airoboros 70B (L2)
license: Llama 2 Community License Agreement (custom Meta license)
note: Fully synthetic, GPT-4-generated self-instruct fine-tune of Llama 2 70B; a solo-developer pipeline that produced a broadly competitive open 70B chat model.
tpsNote: 70B does not fit in a single RTX 4090's 24GB VRAM at Q4 (~40GB needed); no verified single-GPU llama.cpp measurement found.

results.notes: 5-shot GSM8K (harness|gsm8k|5, acc 0.247157) from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard details dataset for the exact model checkpoint tracked here, jondurbin/airoboros-l2-70b-gpt4-2.0 (model_sha f16526d9... confirmed in the raw JSON, so not conflated with the later 2.2.1/3.1.2 Airoboros checkpoints that also show up in search results with different, higher GSM8K scores).

5-shot WinoGrande (harness|winogrande|5, acc 0.835043) from the same exact-model HF Open LLM Leaderboard details JSON (model_sha-verified as airoboros-l2-70b-gpt4-2.0, not a later Airoboros checkpoint).

3-shot DROP F1 (harness|drop|3, f1 0.406267; EM was 0.343121) from the same exact-model HF Open LLM Leaderboard details JSON, reporting F1 per this corpus's established DROP convention (see e.g. openhermes-2-5-mistral-7b.json).

verificationNotes: Confirmed real model via HF model card fetch (jondurbin/airoboros-l2-70b-gpt4-2.0): 70B Llama-2 finetune, custom Llama-2 license, explicit coding + function-calling dataset content confirmed. All four Open-LLM-Leaderboard CSV scores (MMLU 70.4, ARC 68.5, HellaSwag 87.9, TruthfulQA 49.8) fetched and literally confirmed on the cited CSV. releaseDate 2023-08-05 could not be pinned to the exact day (search shows the sibling TheBloke quantized repos were created late July/early August 2023, i.e. within days of the claimed date) — kept as-is since no contradicting date was found, but exact-day precision is unconfirmed.
